data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple time slots per day for the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only two bookings exist, which does not demonstrate that multiple time slots are being utilized effectively. The evidence from the 'owner-calendar-review' step shows that only two bookings were made, which fails to confirm the requirement of having multiple time slots available, thus indicating a gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: Only 2 bookings exist, failing to demonstrate the availability of multiple time slots per day.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
